caption: The video features an older man with gray hair and glasses, wearing a blue shirt adorned with a colorful design and a beaded necklace. He is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is giving a speech or presentation. The background consists of wooden slats, indicating an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or lecture hall. Throughout the video, the man gestures expressively with his hands, emphasizing points as he speaks. His movements are deliberate and animated, indicating that he is engaged and passionate about the topic he is discussing. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting at the possible affiliation or theme of the event.
